name: Vipshop Holdings Limited
description: Vipshop Holdings Limited is a leading online discount retailer for brands in China. The company offers high-quality and popular branded products to consumers throughout the country at significant discounts from retail prices. Operating primarily through its online platforms, including VIP.com, the company has established a unique business model that differentiates it from conventional large-scale multi-category online retailers. Founded in 2008 and headquartered in Guangzhou, Vipshop focuses on providing a curated shopping experience that combines value with brand authenticity, serving a vast customer base across the People's Republic of China.
